Work X

Decentralized infrastructure for the internet of jobs.

None
Bronze at Min Tier
  • Project Info
  • Swap & Claim
  • Price per token0.20 BUSD per  WORK
  • Swap Amount1,000,000 WORK
  • Total Raise$200,000

  • Token Claim Network
    Binance Smart Chain
  • Vesting ScheduleTGE 15%, no cliff, vesting 4 months (21,25%)

Intro

The first fully decentralized job economy that allows people to collaborate without commercial middlemen like UpWork or Indeed, enabling AI Job matching empowering both talent and employers without the need to possess Web3 knowledge. Work X offers a dynamic cost-covering fee model that can scale down in costs due to learning effects & economies of scale & scope. This optimizes salaries for workers and minimizes service costs for employers.
